nl_query: Which evaluators are currently in the pool for active boards but have no active script assignments, and show their faculty name, department, and the boards they are eligible for.
failed_sql: SELECT fc.name AS evaluator_name, au.display_name AS user_display_name, au.department_id, au.unit_type, b.id AS board_id FROM evaluator_pool ep JOIN board b ON b.id = ep.board_id JOIN faculty_cache fc ON fc.id = ep.faculty_cache_id JOIN app_user au ON au.faculty_cache_id = fc.id WHERE ep.is_available = TRUE AND b.status NOT IN ('CLOSED', 'SUBMITTED') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM script_assignment sa WHERE sa.faculty_cache_id = ep.faculty_cache_id AND sa.is_active = TRUE) ORDER BY fc.name, b.id;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): app_user.department_id, app_user.unit_type. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
